name: mcc
description: Claude Code plugin for the Macaron model — WebUI for GenUI builder, workspace + session management.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @macaron/shared && npm run build -w @macaron/server && npm run build -w @macaron/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @macaron/shared && npm run build -w @macaron/web
scripts.build:server: npm run build -w @macaron/shared && npm run build -w @macaron/server
scripts.prepack: npm run build -w @macaron/shared && npm run bundle -w @macaron/server && npm run build -w @macaron/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @macaron/shared && npm run typecheck -w @macaron/server && npm run typecheck -w @macaron/web
